Light Rain with light thunderstorm and low probability of lightning is very likely to occur at isolated places over Dadra And Nagar Haveli, Daman,Anand,Bharuch,Chhotaudepur,Dahod,Jamnagar,Kheda,Morbi, Narmada,Navsari,Panch Mahals,Rajkot,Surat,Surendranagar, Tapi,The Dangs,Vadodara, Valsad in next 3 hours.
